name: ddd-workshop
description: DDD pipeline — 7 conversational skills grouped into Pre-DDD, Strategic, Tactical, and Implementation phases. requirements-refiner (Pre-DDD: context + UL base language + 8-item self-audit + optional web research + 1-Q-at-a-time queue), event-storming-explorer (Strategic: Big Picture Event Storming + subdomain identification only, no classification), subdomain-classifier (Strategic: Core/Supporting/Generic + Slice-first target), context-designer (Strategic: Bounded Context + Context Map + per-BC Canvas with embedded per-BC Ubiquitous Language in bilingual 용어/Code Identifier/의미 format; cross-BC terms go to optional published-language.md), screen-inventory (Strategic, optional: per-BC screen list surfacing read-paths without wireframes), aggregate-designer (Tactical: Design-Level Event Storming + Aggregate + Invariant/Policy + Exposed Queries cross-checked against screen-inventory; Aggregate-reconstruction-for-reads forbidden), implementation-blueprint (Implementation: folder structure, layer boundaries, BC communication patterns for a monolithic backend via 10-question interview; produces docs/implementation-blueprint.md; covers folder names only, not file/class/function names). Artifacts live in docs/shared/contexts/<bc>/. Produced documents carry no YAML frontmatter — git history is the source of truth. Every skill embeds a shared UX protocol and supports --update for delta edits.
